era: Twee Pop. E=3 -- FIRST TWEE POP. Genre Stage 104. Deliberately quiet, deliberately small, deliberately charming. Sonic relief after E=7/E=8 zone. v1.49.335.

location.formative: Capitol Hill indie pop scene. Anti-grunge. Jangly, gentle, intimate.
location.career: Tullycraft. 1994-present. Harriet Records. Over 30 years active.

members.name: Sean Tollefson
members.note: Founder. Defined the Tullycraft sound. Jangly, lyric-driven pop songs. Over 30 years.

theory_nodes.concept: FIRST TWEE POP -- Genre Stage 104. Twee pop enters the engine. Deliberately quiet, small, charming. Jangly guitars, sincerity, charm over power. The 104th genre stage.
examples: Twee: from British slang, excessively dainty.
Simple jangly guitars, gentle vocals, innocent lyrics.
Rejection of rock bombast. Charm over power.
theory_nodes.description: First twee pop. Genre Stage 104. Deliberately gentle.

genealogy.relationship: Tullycraft at 194. First twee pop in the engine.

theory_nodes.concept: Sonic relief -- E=3 after the E=7/E=8 zone. The engine needs dynamic range. Quiet after loud gives the loud its meaning. Tullycraft provides essential decompression.
examples: E=7 at degree 193 SPS (Gray Whale breach).
The rest that gives the loud its meaning.
theory_nodes.description: Sonic relief. E=3 after E=7/E=8. Essential decompression.

genealogy.relationship: Tullycraft at 194 provides relief after the high-energy zone.

theory_nodes.concept: Twee and punk share a root -- both reject mainstream polish, both DIY. But punk rejects through raw energy, twee through deliberate gentleness. Opposite responses to the same impulse.
examples: Punk: raw energy. Twee: deliberate gentleness.
Opposite ends of the rejection spectrum.
theory_nodes.description: Twee and punk: same root, opposite expression.

genealogy.relationship: Tullycraft at 194 shares roots with the Fastbacks at 193. Different branches.

cross_references.relationship: E=5 to E=3. Punk to twee. Both DIY, both anti-mainstream. Different branches of the same root.
E=8 to E=3 in 6 degrees. Maximum to near-minimum. The relief is structural.
Power-pop peer. Shared melodic sensibility. Different intensity levels.
PopLlama to Harriet Records. Indie label progression. Same DIY spirit.
